issues.description: Text states '[Your Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. Duration must persist throughout your turn, not end immediately.
Power boost amount is static (1000), but text specifies 'for every card in your hand' — amount must be dynamic, calculated as cardCount × 1000. Current DSL does not support variable multiplier.

Trigger 'Activated' suggests manual activation, but text describes a passive conditional effect ('This Character gains'). Should be 'Trigger' with appropriate condition, or restructured as a state-based effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [Your Turn] This Character gains +1000 power for every card in your hand.
